items.title: Fox averaged 38.9 million viewers for the Spain-Argentina final.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
Fox averaged 38.9 million viewers for the Spain-Argentina final.

Telemundo averaged 23.9 million viewers.

That's more than 60 million viewers in the U.S. who watched the final between English and Spanish-language television.
